steps.title: Use similar shadow triangles
steps.content: At the same time of day, the radio tower and flagpole form similar triangles with their shadows. So the ratio of height to shadow length is the same for both objects.

steps.title: Set up the proportion
steps.content:
Let $h$ be the flagpole height. Then
$$
\frac{520}{250}=\frac{h}{14}
$$

steps.title: Solve and round
steps.content: Cross multiply: $$ 250h=520\cdot 14=7{,}280 $$ $$ h=\frac{7{,}280}{250}=29.12 $$ The closest listed height is $30$ feet. The answer is C.
